name: Acrylic Shader
title: Acrylic Shader
description: A self-contained WebGL fluid-gradient background that reacts to pointer and touch with a soft swirl. Four built-in palettes, zero dependencies, no Tailwind required. Degrades to a static gradient without WebGL or under reduced-motion.

files.content:
export { default as AcrylicShader, ACRYLIC_SHADER_PRESETS } from "./AcrylicShader";
export type { AcrylicShaderProps, AcrylicShaderPreset, AcrylicShaderPalette, } from "./AcrylicShader";
